================= REPORT SAVE =================

[CCSDS HEADER]
MsgId      : 0x0825
Seq        : 0xC000
Len        : 0x0215
TimeCode   : 00 95 AE D7 DA 87
Padding    : 0x00000000

[REPORT BODY]
Reflected MID  : 0x1875
Reflected CC   : 0x1A
RetType        : 0x05
RetCode        : 0
RetValSize     : 124

================= PARSED BY MID/CC =================

ReflectedCC  : 0x1A
PayloadLen   : 124

[Inputs]
c_in[0..5]: 10 19 16 21 17 20

vbat: 16222

temp[0..2]: 225 225 226

power[0..5]: 2 4 4 6 5 5

dac_en[0..2]: 1 1 1

bootcause : 3054841720
bootcnt   : 1
uptime    : 146
resetcause: 0x4E9A

[MPPT Timing]
mppt_time  : 49
mppt_period: 1

[Device]
device_type[0..7]: 22 0 49 0 0 0 7 1

[WDT]
